title: The 10 Must-Have Features in a Global IoT Connectivity Partner
raw_content:
# The 10 Must-Have Features in a Global IoT Connectivity Partner

Choosing a connectivity provider for a single-country rollout is one thing. Choosing one for a global fleet is another.

Here's your checklist for a partner that can scale with you:

1. Global coverage – 600+ networks in 170+ countries.

2. Multi-network SIMs – coverage isn't tied to a single carrier.

3. eUICC and eSIM support – for remote provisioning and updates.

4. Cloud management platform – central control over all devices.

5. Integrated analytics – to turn data into decisions.

6. Flexible pricing – tailored to deployment size and usage.

7. Strong security standards – GDPR compliance, private APNs, secure routing.

8. Local Internet Breakout (local POPs) – minimise latency and improve performance by routing traffic closer to the device.

9. API integration – for OEM and fleet management platforms.

10. Future-proof tech – support for 5G, LTE-M, and the new SGP.32 standard, which brings more flexible and universal eSIM management.

## Why SGP.32 Matters

SGP.32 is the latest GSMA specification for eSIM technology. Unlike older standards, which made it difficult to manage large fleets of IoT devices across borders, SGP.32 is designed to:

- Simplify eSIM provisioning – making it faster and easier to switch carriers remotely.
- Improve interoperability – ensuring devices can connect seamlessly across different operators and platforms.
- Streamline lifecycle management – so enterprises can scale without being locked into one provider.

For global IoT deployments like dashcam fleets, this means lower operational overhead, smoother rollouts, and greater freedom to choose the best connectivity at every stage.

## From Pilot to Global Rollout

The smart approach is to start with a pilot in a key market, prove the setup works, then scale without reworking the configuration.

Pick the right partner, and your dashcam rollout becomes a smooth, controlled process not a game of international network roulette.

## Why OV is the Partner Built for Your Fleet

The right IoT partner turns a complex global rollout into a controlled, predictable success. With OV, you get global reach, eSIM simplicity, and ONE platform to rule them all. Wherever your dashcams go, OV keeps them connected.

Find out more at worldov.com.
